title: AI chatbots refilling psych meds sparks debate
description: An artificial intelligence chatbot is handling select mental health medication renewals in Utah, sparking debate over transparency and patient safety.
content:

title: Gujarat police roll out AI tool to sharpen probe in NDPS cases, boost conviction rates
description: Gandhinagar, Apr 10 (PTI) Gujarat Police have developed a first-of-its-kind artificial intelligence tool ‘NARIT’ that can assess the strengths and weaknesses of narcotics cases, and provide real-time legal guidance to investigators to ensure higher conviction rates, officials said on Friday. Designed to make investigations watertight, ‘NARIT’ (Narcotics Analysis & RAG-based Investigation Tool) can even predict […]
content:
Abhay Soni, Superintendent of Police (SP), Western Railway, Vadodara, noted that investigations were earlier handled only by specialised police staff, which caused workload and administrative delays.

title: US utility stocks are off to their best start since 2019. Can they keep it up?
description: U.S. utility stocks marked their ​strongest start to the year since 2019, benefiting from an investor retreat from riskier assets during the Iran ‌war and strong electricity demand from firms building out artificial intelligence infrastructure.

title: American Gen Z losing trust in AI despite growing use of the tech: Study
description: A new study reveals a paradox at the heart of Gen Z’s relationship with artificial intelligence: while usage remains steady and its importance undeniable, trust is eroding. As layoffs reshape the job market, young people are increasingly questioning whether AI will empower their future or quietly undermine it.
content:
Gen Z is not abandoning artificial intelligence. But it is no longer embracing it with the same optimism.
A new study conducted by Gallup in partnership with GSV Ventures and the Walton Family Foundation paints a nuanced picture of how young American... [4019 chars]
